name: @borjie/info-synthesis
description: Information Synthesis SOTA (Wave M7) — multi-stage diorize pipeline (chunk → score → cluster → reconcile → write → cite → calibrate) that distills + categorises + synthesizes a corpus into a calibrated, multi-perspective brief with citations, disagreements, and confidence intervals. Engine behind 'Mr. Mwikila summarises 47 sources into 1 actionable brief.' See Docs/DESIGN/INFORMATION_SYNTHESIS_SOTA_SPEC.md.
